resources.string: A limited selection of archived silhouettes, available for 48 hours only.
Our silk is sourced from sustainable farms in Vietnam, woven with a density that allows for both structure and fluidity. A material that breathes with the body.
THE WARDROBE IS A CANVAS OF INTENTIONALITY.
When there is a new drop or order update,\nwe will gently notify you.
The Autumn Collection has arrived. 12 new pieces.

Made to be worn, not replaced. Our philosophy centers on durability and timeless artisanal design.
Quiet pieces for everyday elegance. A study of texture and shadow through tone-on-tone layering.
Thoughtfully designed for modern living. Pieces that transition seamlessly from home to city.
Directly check ESG and financial scores
Input ESG score to predict financial performance (linear regression)
ESG score must be between 0 and 100
Enter company name (e.g., Company_1) to view aggregated ESG score and financial performance by year.
No company found matching \"%1$s\".\nTry another name or use \'Company_1\', \'Company_2\'...
No data found for the year %1$d. Try another year.
No data found for this filter.
AVERAGE ESG SCORE OF PEER SEGMENT
✅ High ESG (≥70): Businesses usually have high capacity to attract sustainable investment capital, reduce legal risks, and boost brand reputation.
⚠️ Medium ESG (50–70): Need to improve some criteria to access green capital and meet global ESG reporting requirements.
🔴 Low ESG (<50): High risks in governance, environment, and social. Negatively impacts stock price and long-term cost of capital.
SAIVE is a quiet luxury fashion brand born in Saigon. We believe beauty does not have to be loud, each collection consists of only 12 carefully crafted pieces made from sustainable materials.
How do I place an order?
Browse our collections, select your piece, choose your size and color, then tap \'Add to Bag\'. Once ready, proceed to checkout and fill in your shipping and payment details.
We accept Cash on Delivery (COD), Momo Wallet, ZaloPay, Bank Transfer, and Credit/Debit Cards.
Standard delivery within Vietnam takes 3–5 business days. Express options may be available depending on your location.
Can I return or exchange an item?
Yes. We offer a 30-day return policy, no questions asked. Items must be unworn and in original condition. Contact us to initiate a return.
How do I track my order?
Go to Profile → My Orders, select your order, and tap \'Track Order\' to see real-time delivery status.
Absolutely. We use 100% natural materials including linen from pesticide-free European farms, TENCEL from recycled wood fiber, and bamboo fabric that is fully biodegradable.
How do I use a voucher code?
During checkout, enter your voucher code in the \'Promo Code\' field and tap Apply. The discount will be reflected in your order total.
Can I save items to my wardrobe?
Yes. Tap the wardrobe icon on any product to save it. Access your saved pieces anytime from the Wardrobe tab in the bottom navigation.
How do I contact customer support?
Visit our Contact Us page or email us at hello@saive.vn. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
We\'d love to hear from you.
Reach out through any channel below or send us a message directly.
We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.\nHANOI · SAIGON
Message sent. We\'ll get back to you shortly.
Tell us how we can help…
Choose where you want your order to be delivered.
You are browsing as a Guest
Browsing as Guest. Tap to Login.
Don\'t have an account? Sign up

Welcome to SAIVE. By using our app, you agree to the following terms:

1. Use of Service: You must provide accurate information.
2. Privacy: Your data is protected per our policy.
3. Content: All designs are property of SAIVE.
4. Liability: We are not liable for indirect damages.

Thank you for choosing SAIVE.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

See the recommended size for you
Tell us what you think about this piece…
Explore our collections and add pieces\nthat resonate with you.

Starting from a simple question:
why does beauty have to be loud?
SAIVE was born in Saigon, from
the belief that simplicity
is the highest form of luxury.
We choose the fabric before the design.
Sourced from pesticide-free European farms. Breathable.
Recycled wood fiber. Soft as silk. 50%% cooler than cotton.
Regrows in 90 days. Pesticide-free. Fully biodegradable.
"Each collection consists of only 12 pieces.\nNo more. No less."
We don\'t follow seasons. We follow life\'s rhythm.
Save this information for next time
Scan and pay with any banking apps
Pay when you receive the package
An error occurred. Please try again.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Please agree to the Terms & Conditions
Thank you for choosing SAIVE. Your order has been received and is being prepared with care.
Autumn Drop: Embracing the transition with warm textures and earthy tones.

Our new collection has finally arrived. This season, we focused on sustainable materials and timeless silhouettes. Crafted from premium Italian wool and recycled silk, each garment is designed to be a staple in your wardrobe for years to come.

• Copy the code below.
• Go to your cart or checkout page.
• Paste the code into the 'Coupon code' box.
• Enjoy exclusive offers from Saive!
Get 20%% off on your first order
Photo selection feature will be integrated later
Scan this QR Code to process your payment
This QR Code will be expired in %1$s
Please select a location on map
This message will be sent to all users immediately.
Are you sure you want to delete this voucher? This cannot be undone.
The material is incredible. It feels so soft and looks very elegant.
Are you sure you want to logout?
Discover our latest collection of premium silk and wool pieces designed for your everyday luxury.
We believe in slow fashion. Every piece is crafted with care, ensuring longevity and timeless style that transcends seasons.
A study of light and shadow. Minimalist silhouettes in a palette of deep noir and crisp ivory.
Every line is intentional. Our Monochrome series focuses on the purity of form and the quality of construction.
Warm textures and layered forms. Embracing the change of season with premium wool blends and rich tones.
Crafted for the shifting winds. We use high-density wool and thermal silk to keep you elegant and warm.
Fluidity meets structure. Sourced from traditional Vietnamese looms, our silk pieces redefine modern elegance.
Our silk is woven in Bao Loc, known for its incredible luster and durability. A material that breathes with the body.
Built for longevity and versatility in any wardrobe.
Exploring the intersection of function and form.
